protocol.name: test_custom_ns
protocol.copyright: Test protocol for verifying code generation under a non-NWayland root namespace.

interface.name: test_custom_ns_thing

description.summary: Generated under a root namespace not nested under NWayland

interface.description: Regression guard: WlProxy (base type), IWlTargetQueue and WlFixed live in the root NWayland namespace and are referenced unqualified, so the generated file must emit `using NWayland;` for non-NWayland target namespaces to compile.

description.summary: exercises an unqualified WlFixed event arg
